title: What’s going on with Developers and AI?
summary: The video explores how AI tools and LLMs are reshaping software development, tracing the evolution from early accessible coding to the modern AI-assisted era. It argues that tools like Google AI Studio are lowering barriers to application development and making it an exciting time to be a developer.
